title: More Beautiful Totem Of Unduying
description: A new 3D model of totem of undying, inspired by the Actions & Stuff resource pack
body:
# **About the Resource pack**

Hello everybody! This resource pack is a remake of the previous pack "The Beautiful Totem Of Undying". I lost access to the account on which I posted with him, and I'm releasing a new one.

The pack resource includes:
1. A new 3D model of the totem with an outline, inspired by the resource pack on the thigh "Actions & Stuff" 
2. Separate 2D texture in the inventory and when the totem of immortality is triggered.
but! It works best with the [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items/versions?g=1.21.8) mod

![thinorbold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d24bdd4d2157af5ee32e58ca2c24278d4e6ab941.png)

## **Plans**

1. Improve the totem model and make it more similar to A&S
2. Add several color variations that will change the name
3. To implement the ideas that will be in the future![a]
4. Fixing bugs
   
 
![totem on earth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hqT6nsip/images/54d50b6ceeef7c36f607f4a9cf81ee99c3105119_350.webp)
